description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a standard rectangular shape and a low-profile design. The keyboard features a complete set of alphanumeric keys, a function row, arrow keys, and a dedicated numeric keypad on the right. The keycaps are black with white printed legends, providing high contrast for easy visibility. The chassis appears to be made of matte black plastic with a slightly textured finish, and the underside is likely reinforced with a lighter-colored plastic or metal base. The keyboard is slim, with a flat profile and no visible wrist rest or additional macro keys. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and no brand logo is apparent on the surface.
description: A full-size black keyboard with white legends, numeric keypad, and a slim, rectangular profile. The surface is matte and slightly textured, with no visible branding or cables.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entire key layout, including the alphanumeric section, function row, and numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile and the raised keycaps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back edge and the uniform thickness of the keyboard.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the other side of the keyboard and the key arrangement.
